name: scene_nodes_connect_battle_test
description: Battle-test the rewritten connect_ports handler (imperative BeginTransaction+Connect path) against real synthesized capsules. Creates 4 capsules across the 4 verified-only patterns, makes multiple port connections, walks each to verify the wires landed via inline Python checks. If ANY wire fails to land, the recipe fails.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['BT_Memory', 'BT_Scatter', 'BT_HashSel', 'BT_Loop']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('battle-test setup ok')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
cap = doc.SearchObject('BT_Scatter')
if not cap: raise RuntimeError('BT_Scatter not in scene')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(cap)
found = False
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if '@' in cid and '/' not in cid and cid.split('@')[0] == 'surfacescaledbluenoise':
        found = True; break
if not found: raise AssertionError('BT_Scatter is missing surfacescaledbluenoise node')
print('SCATTER VERIFIED: surfacescaledbluenoise present in BT_Scatter')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['BT_Memory', 'BT_Scatter', 'BT_HashSel', 'BT_Loop']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
